decks.notes: The focus of this deck is on quickly dealing damage to the opponent through burn spells and cheap aggressive creatures. It aims to overwhelm the opponent with a rapid and relentless assault, utilizing direct damage spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, as well as efficient creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic. The inclusion of cards like Sulfuric Vortex and Pyrostatic Pillar ensure consistent damage output, while Earthquake serves as a versatile finisher. The deck's mana base is optimized for consistent aggression, with a mix of fetch lands and utility lands like Mishra's Factory and Barbarian Ring.

The deck focuses on utilizing enchantments to build up card advantage and mana acceleration through Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence. By using cards like Serra's Sanctum and Wild Growth, the deck is able to ramp up quickly and establish a board presence. The goal is to ultimately win through the combo of Opalescence and Parallax Wave, while also utilizing control elements like Decree of Justice and Swords to Plowshares to disrupt opponent strategies. The deck emphasizes synergy between enchantments and includes key cards like Sterling Grove and Replenish to ensure consistency in executing its game plan.

The main concept of this deck is to use enchantress cards to draw cards and generate mana, while using enchantment synergy to control the board and win the game through a combo involving Opalescence and Parallax Wave. The deck aims to create a powerful enchantment presence on the battlefield, utilizing cards like Enchantress's Presence and Mirri's Guile to draw into key pieces like Serra's Sanctum and Replenish. By combining enchantment ramp, card draw, and removal, the deck can establish a dominant board state and overwhelm the opponent with its enchantress combo.

The main focus of this deck is to combo off by using Enchantress effects to draw a large amount of cards, then set up a powerful board state with cards like Opalescence and Serra's Sanctum. Parallax Wave and Replenish serve as additional combo pieces to control the board and generate advantage. The deck also includes protection in the form of Sterling Grove and Solitary Confinement. Overall, the goal is to overwhelm the opponent with enchantments and outvalue them through card draw and efficient combos.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo pieces needed to generate a large storm count and win the game in a single turn. By using cards like Show and Tell and Dream Halls to cheat out powerful spells, the deck can generate mana efficiently with cards like Frantic Search and Ancient Tomb. Intuition helps tutor for key combo pieces while Brain Freeze serves as a win condition. The deck aims to draw through the deck rapidly with cards like Opportunity and Rush of Knowledge, enabling a powerful combo finish.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana with enchantments like Wild Growth and Mirri's Guile, while drawing cards with Argothian Enchantress and Enchantress's Presence. The deck aims to control the board with cards like Parallax Wave and Seal of Cleansing, before finishing the game by turning all enchantments into creatures with Opalescence and overwhelming the opponent with a massive army. Additionally, the deck can bring back all enchantments from the graveyard with Replenish to reestablish board presence and continue the combo.

This deck relies on utilizing the combo between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful disruption tactic against opponents. By using cards like Gush, Daze, Counterspell, and Foil to control the game, the player can set up the Dreadnought combo while also protecting it from being countered or removed. The deck includes additional card draw and cycling options like Opt and Portent to help find the necessary pieces quickly. With a focus on efficiency and timing, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a sudden and unexpected win condition.

The deck focuses on utilizing cards like Stifle, Counterspell, and Phyrexian Dreadnought to quickly assemble a powerful combo that can end the game in just a few turns. By efficiently countering opponent's spells, drawing cards, and manipulating the top of the deck, the player can control the game state and set up the perfect opportunity to play the Dreadnought and win the game. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while quickly building its own win condition, making it a formidable force in the Premodern format.

The main focus of this deck is to put pressure on the opponent quickly with aggressive creatures like Jackal Pup and Quirion Dryad, and burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate to finish them off. The deck also includes cards like Call of the Herd and Treetop Village to provide additional threats. The use of efficient mana sources like Wooded Foothills and Forest','','');">Karplusan Forest helps ensure a consistent stream of threats and removal spells, allowing the deck to maintain a steady offensive strategy throughout the game.

The main strategy of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan by using a combination of discard spells like Duress and Cabal Therapy, along with removal like Smother and Innocent Blood. Contamination is a key enchantment that can shut down an opponent's mana production, while Zombie Infestation allows for a steady stream of creatures to apply pressure. The deck also includes utility lands like Rishadan Port and Mishra's Factory, along with card advantage engines like Skeletal Scrying and Phyrexian Arena. The overall game plan is to control the game until victory is assured.

The deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with creatures like Hermit Druid and Nomads en-Kor, then using cards like Reanimate and Exhume to bring back powerful creatures like Sutured Ghoul or Exalted Angel. Cabal Therapy and Duress are used to disrupt the opponent's game plan and protect the combo pieces. The goal is to ultimately reanimate a large threat like Sutured Ghoul and give it haste with Dragon Breath to quickly close out the game before the opponent can respond. The deck is explosive and aims to win the game in a few turns.

The deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with a swarm of aggressive goblin creatures, backed up by powerful support cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to disrupt their game plan. With key cards like Goblin Ringleader and Goblin Warchief allowing for card advantage and mana acceleration, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain that pressure throughout the game. The inclusion of cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Gempalm Incinerator provide additional reach and removal options to help secure victory.

The deck focuses on dealing damage quickly and efficiently, utilizing cards that deal direct damage to opponents and punish them for having cards in hand. It aims to maintain board control through cards like Ensnaring Bridge and Pyrostatic Pillar while steadily burning the opponent's life total with burn spells and creatures like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a continuous stream of damage to win the game before they can stabilize.

The main focus of this Aggro - Sligh (RDW) deck is to overwhelm the opponent with fast and efficient damage-dealing cards. By using low-cost creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup, as well as burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, the deck aims to quickly reduce the opponent's life total to zero. Additional cards like Grim Lavamancer and Sulfuric Vortex provide extra damage and pressure. The deck also includes some utility cards like Cursed Scroll and Reckless Abandon to further solidify its aggressive strategy.

The main focus of this RG Aggro deck is to apply pressure early on in the game with efficient creatures like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic, backed up by burn spells such as Lightning Bolt and Incinerate. The deck also includes cards like Quirion Dryad to grow in power as you cast spells, along with utility cards like Lava Dart and Naturalize to disrupt your opponent's game plan. The goal is to maintain a fast-paced aggressive strategy while using cards like Sylvan Library for card advantage and Treetop Village for additional threats.

The deck focuses on playing aggressive red and green creatures, along with burn spells, to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also includes cards like Jackal Pup and Mogg Fanatic to apply pressure early in the game. The deck utilizes efficient creatures like Quirion Dryad and Treetop Village to provide a consistent source of damage. The inclusion of cards like Call of the Herd and Sylvan Library helps to maintain card advantage and ensure the deck can continue turning up the heat on the opponent.
